summary: Iteration 70 - CRM Command Center feature fully verified. All 10 features working correctly. CRM is front and center in Adviser mode navigation (first section). Command Center shows HUB badge. Client cards display wealth amounts, account breakdowns, quick actions on hover. Today's Tasks and Notifications panels functional. Search/filter working. All data is MOCKED/DEMO.

issues: Compliance modal appears on page load - requires checkbox + button click to dismiss

critical_code_review_comments: CRMCommandCenter.jsx properly implements all required features with demo data
Layout.jsx correctly places CRM as first navigation section in Adviser mode
Command Center has HUB badge to highlight it as main CRM entry point
Quick action buttons properly use event.stopPropagation() to prevent card click propagation
Search filters by name and email correctly
Status filters (All, Active, Prospect, Review) work correctly
Client card click stores selected client in localStorage and navigates to /client-wealth
All interactive elements have proper data-testid attributes for testing
seed_data_creation: No seed data needed - all CRM data is DEMO/MOCKED in frontend
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 70 verified CRM Command Center: 1) Page loads at /crm-command-center, 2) Hero header shows Total AUM ($13.58M), Active Clients (3), Prospects (1), Reviews Due (1), Urgent Tasks (3), 3) 5 demo clients displayed with wealth amounts and change percentages, 4) Account breakdown per client (Super, Investment, Property, Cash, Trust, SMSF), 5) Quick action buttons on hover (Wallet, Tasks, Docs, Call, Email), 6) Today's Tasks panel with priority badges, 7) Notifications panel with 4 alerts, 8) Practice Health metrics (Client Satisfaction 87%, Review Compliance 92%, Document Completion 78%, Revenue Target 105%), 9) Search/filter working, 10) Client card click navigates to /client-wealth. Navigation in Adviser mode shows CRM as FIRST section with Command Center marked as HUB.

mocked_apis.CRM_Command_Center: MOCKED - All client data is demo/mocked in frontend
mocked_apis.clients: MOCKED - 5 demo clients (Wheeler $2.85M, Chen $5.20M, Mitchell $1.45M, Williams $980K, Patel $3.10M)
mocked_apis.tasks: MOCKED - 6 demo tasks with priority levels (urgent, high, medium)
mocked_apis.notifications: MOCKED - 4 demo notifications (warning, info, success types)

features_verified.notifications_panel: PASS - 4 notification items with color indicators

features_verified.search_functionality: PASS - Search filters clients by name/email correctly
features_verified.filter_functionality: PASS - All, Active, Prospect, Review filters work correctly
features_verified.navigation_crm_first: PASS - CRM is first section in Adviser mode sidebar
